q: Technology is best when it brings people together.
It's not a faith in technology. It's faith in people.
Software is eating the world.
Any sufficiently advanced technology is indistinguishable from magic.
Talk is cheap. Show me the code.
First, solve the problem. Then, write the code.
The computer was born to solve problems that did not exist before.
Innovation distinguishes between a leader and a follower.
Simplicity is the soul of efficiency.
The real danger is not that computers will begin to think like men, but that men will begin to think like computers.
The best way to predict the future is to invent it.
Any fool can write code that a computer can understand. Good programmers write code that humans can understand.
Design is not just what it looks like and feels like. Design is how it works.
Programming is not about typing, it's about thinking.
Don't comment bad code - rewrite it.

Java is to JavaScript what car is to Carpet.

Good design adds value faster than it adds cost.

Make it work, make it right, make it fast.

Data is the new oil.

If you think good architecture is expensive, try bad architecture.
Nine people can't make a baby in a month.

Never trust a computer you can't throw out a window.
Machines take me by surprise with great frequency.
Programming is the art of telling another human being what one wants the computer to do.
Code never lies, comments sometimes do.
It's not a bug, it's an undocumented feature.
Software is a great combination between artistry and engineering.
Hardware: The parts of a computer system that can be kicked.
There are only two kinds of languages: the ones people complain about and the ones nobody uses.
Learning to write programs stretches your mind, and helps you think better.
The best thing about a boolean is even if you are wrong, you are only off by a bit.
Computers are incredibly fast, accurate, and stupid. Human beings are incredibly slow, inaccurate, and brilliant. Together they are powerful beyond imagination.
A good programmer is someone who always looks both ways before crossing a one-way street.
Debugging is twice as hard as writing the code in the first place. Therefore, if you write the code as cleverly as possible, you are, by definition, not smart enough to debug it.

Simple is better than complex.
Complex is better than complicated.
The Internet is the first thing that humanity has built that humanity doesn't understand.
Your most unhappy customers are your greatest source of learning.
Programs must be written for people to read, and only incidentally for machines to execute.
Experience is the name everyone gives to their mistakes.
Good code is its own best documentation.
Any code of your own that you haven't looked at for six or more months might as well have been written by someone else.
Java is to JavaScript what car is to Carpet.
In software, the most beautiful code is the code you don't have to write.
The best way to predict the future is to invent it.
We are stuck with technology when what we really want is just stuff that works.
Technology is anything that wasn’t around when you were born.
The real problem is not whether machines think but whether men do.
Computers are useless. They can only give you answers.
So much technology, so little talent.
One of the most feared expressions in modern times is 'The computer is down'.

If you automate a mess, you get an automated mess.
